actions.name: archive_custom_dimension
actions.description: Archive a Google Analytics custom dimension that should no longer be available for reporting configuration.

customDimensionName.description: The custom dimension resource name, such as properties/123/customDimensions/456.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for archiving a Google Analytics custom dimension.

success.description: Whether Google Analytics accepted the archive request.

outputSchema.description: The Google Analytics custom dimension archive response.

actions.name: archive_custom_metric
actions.description: Archive a Google Analytics custom metric that should no longer be available for reporting configuration.

customMetricName.description: The custom metric resource name, such as properties/123/customMetrics/456.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for archiving a Google Analytics custom metric.

success.description: Whether Google Analytics accepted the archive request.

outputSchema.description: The Google Analytics custom metric archive response.

actions.name: batch_run_pivot_reports

endDate.description: The inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format or a relative value such as today.

items.description: A Google Analytics Data API date range.

dateRanges.description: The date ranges for the pivot report.
